source_pr.title: sessiontest: split test into more new packges
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What problem does this PR solve?
<!--

Please create an issue first to describe the problem.

There MUST be one line starting with "Issue Number:  " and 
linking the relevant issues via the "close" or "ref".

For more info, check https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/contribute-code.html#referring-to-an-issue.

-->

Issue Number: close #44940

Problem Summary:

### What is changed and how it works?

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [ ] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [ ] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

Documentation

- [ ] Affects user behaviors
- [ ] Contains syntax changes
- [ ] Contains variable changes
- [ ] Contains experimental features
- [ ] Changes MySQL compatibility

### Release note

<!-- compatibility change, improvement, bugfix, and new feature need a release note -->

Please refer to [Release Notes Language Style Guide](https://pingcap.github.io/tidb-dev-guide/contribute-to-tidb/release-notes-style-guide.html) to write a quality release note.

```release-note
None
```

symptoms: Session test suite was split into multiple new packages and several Bazel go_test targets are marked `flaky=True` (session/test/**/BUILD.bazel)
failure_signature: `flaky=True` test quarantine in session/test/**/BUILD.bazel (no concrete failure signature captured)
root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR mainly restructures the session test suite by splitting tests into multiple packages and adjusting Bazel test metadata (including marking multiple targets as `flaky=True`). The changes look like test-infra organization/quarantine rather than a patch-backed fix for a specific flaky signature. To avoid guessing a specific nondeterminism category from incidental code snippets, classify as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: Split the session test suite into multiple packages and update Bazel test metadata (`flaky=True`/sharding) to manage instability; no concrete flaky signature captured in this case.

evidence: evidence: race = "on", | tk.MustQuery("select /*+ use_index_merge(t1, primary, t1a) */ * from t1 where id < 2 or a > 4 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1 1 1", "5 5 5 5 5")) (session/sessiontest/variable/variable_test.go)

analysis:
PR title: sessiontest: split test into more new packges
PR url: https://github.com/pingcap/tidb/pull/45833
Triage sources: manual_triage, explicit_flaky_signal, determinism_stabilization
Triage summary: race = "on", | tk.MustQuery("select /*+ use_index_merge(t1, primary, t1a) */ * from t1 where id < 2 or a > 4 order by a").Check(testkit.Rows("1 1 1 1 1", "5 5 5 5 5")) (session/sessiontest/variable/variable_test.go)
